Barrel Sauna UK · Design Proposal

The Rowan

The Rowan Hut is designed to provide comfortable accommodation within a practical and spacious layout. Combining the character of a traditional shepherd hut with a bright and functional interior, it offers a versatile space suited to glamping sites, holiday lets, guest accommodation and private retreats.

Its balanced design makes it equally suitable as a standalone rental unit or as an additional accommodation option within an existing hospitality business.

The character of a traditional shepherd hut, with a bright, functional interior built around the way you’ll live in it.

Secure My Spot In the Build Queue
From £25,000 + VAT
Every Rowan, as standard
  • 16 ft × 8 ft external · 128 ft² internal floor space
  • 8 ft wide as standard at no extra cost, for a flexible layout
  • Fully bespoke layouts and interiors
  • Galvanised chassis as standard
  • Minimum of 75 mm insulation for year-round comfort
  • Double glazed throughout for energy efficiency
  • Walls and flooring in pressure-treated, rot-proof timber
  • Wood burner fitted by a HETAS qualified engineer
  • Electrics signed off with test certificate
  • Any gas signed off by a Gas Safe registered engineer
  • Kitchen and bathroom options built to order
  • Made in the UK, built to order
Interior imagery shown for illustration. Each Rowan is finished to the owner’s specification.
Two ways to live in the same hut

Design Configurations

Both configurations below are built from the identical Rowan shell. The entrance, windows and services stay in the same positions, so either layout can be chosen without structural change. A wood-burning stove, shower room and kitchenette are fitted as standard in each.

Configuration 1: Lounge

Bedroom to the left of the entrance, armchair and coffee-table lounge, kitchenette by the stove, shower room at the far end.

Lifestyle plan
Technical plan · dimensions in mm

Configuration 2: Garden Kitchen

Layout fully reversed: shower room beside the entrance, full-length kitchen run, window-seat dining for four, and the bed at the far end under the gable window.

Lifestyle plan
Technical plan · dimensions in mm
Two design configurations are included with this proposal. Detailed working drawings for your chosen configuration are prepared once your build is secured.
Prepared for Chris Hollis

Your price£25,000 + VAT
Included in this price
  • 16 ft × 8 ft shepherd’s hut, built to order
  • Fixed double bed

Delivery is priced separately on your estimate, subject to site.

Optional extras, available to purchase
  • ProWarm underfloor heating, subject to electric supply £850
  • Hamlet Solution 4 wood burner £2,500
  • Multi-use seating area with table and folding double bed £2,000
  • Combi oven, subject to electric supply £700
  • Everhot electric stove in your choice of colour £1,800
  • 2.1 × 2.4 m handmade exterior canopy £650

Extras are added to your build price and confirmed on your final estimate.
